---
title: "hba1c_uge_42"
subtitle: "`hba1c_uge_42`"
description: "hba1c_uge_42"
---

<!--
NEVER EDIT MANUALLY. This documentation was auto-generated by `seedcase-flower`.
If you want to edit the content, please make changes to the `datapackage.json` file.
-->

- Path: `resources/hba1c_uge_42/data.parquet`
- Primary key: (`event`)

| Name                                                           | Title                                                        | Type    | Description                                                                                                       |
|----------------------------------------------------------------|--------------------------------------------------------------|---------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `event`                                                        | The unique name of the event                                 | string  | The unique name identifying the event when the form was filled in.                                                |
| `center`                                                       | Research center                                              | string  | The research center where the data item was recorded.                                                             |
| `date_hba1c_measurement_week_42`                               | date_hba1c_measurement_week_42                               | date    | Date of HbA1c measurement, week 42.                                                                               |
| `book_bloodsample_week_42`                                     | book_bloodsample_week_42                                     | string  | Indicates if bloodsamples have been ordered for the participant. Workflow. Week 42.                               |
| `hba1c_value_week_42`                                          | hba1c_value_week_42                                          | number  | HbA1c value, mmol/mol, week 42.                                                                                   |
| `intervention_challenge_diet_week_42`                          | intervention_challenge_diet_week_42                          | string  | States whether the dietitian has been contacted regarding follow up on the diet intervention. Week 42.            |
| `intervention_challenge_training_week_42`                      | intervention_challenge_training_week_42                      | string  | States whether the exercise manager has been contacted regarding follow up on the training intervention. Week 42. |
| `intervention_challenges_other_week_42`                        | intervention_challenges_other_week_42                        | string  | Describes other reason for not following the intervention. Week 42.                                               |
| `hba1c_date_for_extra_measurement_planned_participant_week_42` | hba1c_date_for_extra_measurement_planned_participant_week_42 | string  | Verify HbA1c follow-up appointment in participants calendar. Week 42.                                             |
| `hba1c_date_for_extra_measurement_planned_staff_week_42`       | hba1c_date_for_extra_measurement_planned_staff_week_42       | string  | Verify HbA1c follow-up appointment in staff calendar. Week 42.                                                    |
| `hba1c_date_for_extra_measurement_planned_room_week_42`        | hba1c_date_for_extra_measurement_planned_room_week_42        | string  | Confirms if a room has been booked for the next HbA1c meausurement. Week 42.                                      |
| `hba1c_notes_week_42`                                          | hba1c_notes_week_42                                          | string  | Notes regarding the HbA1c. Week 42.                                                                               |
| `intervention_challenges_week_42___1`                          | Udfordring i forhold til diæten.                             | boolean | Challenges with adherence to the intervention, whether diet or training. Week 42.                                 |
| `intervention_challenges_week_42___2`                          | Udfordring i forhold til træningen.                          | boolean | Challenges with adherence to the intervention, whether diet or training. Week 42.                                 |
| `intervention_challenges_week_42___3`                          | Andet                                                        | boolean | Challenges with adherence to the intervention, whether diet or training. Week 42.                                 |

: Fields in the `hba1c_uge_42` resource.
